title: Snow Grass
description: Makes snow grass and leaves Adds a winter scent
body:
This texture pack transforms the world into a winter landscape.
Green grass is replaced with a snowy version that looks cold and fresh.
Leaves on trees also become snowy, creating a true winter atmosphere.
The world feels colder and more alive, like during a real winter season.
Snowy textures keep the original vanilla style of Minecraft.
Everything looks natural and fits perfectly into the game.
This pack is ideal for winter maps, survival worlds, and snowy builds.
It adds a light winter scent without changing the core gameplay.
Vanilla textures are preserved, only adapted to a winter theme.
